chunk_0493849a9c4cc55eb5b6310c8a1a6516: Bill Gates founded Microsoft Corporation in 1975 together with Paul Allen. Microsoft became one of the world's largest technology companies and revolutionized personal computing.
chunk_7e42a4de50ac79571da113fb964cfa2d: Bill Gates married Melinda French in 1994. They have three children together: Jennifer, Rory, and Phoebe. The couple divorced in 2021 after 27 years of marriage.
chunk_1743acdaa4152ec12db80fe51b1b77e3: Melinda French Gates was born on August 15, 1964, in Dallas, Texas. She graduated from Duke University with a bachelor's degree in computer science and economics.
chunk_074f2c0797070a0cc00deab51dbee66c: Microsoft is headquartered in Redmond, Washington. The company was incorporated in New Mexico in 1981 before moving its headquarters to Washington state.
chunk_16683e1d003f5e036dae5543c80441ef: Paul Allen co-founded Microsoft with Bill Gates. Allen left Microsoft in 1983 due to health issues but remained on the board until 2000.
chunk_354f17565b3b3b6f8e8eca96e2a34d91: Satya Nadella became the CEO of Microsoft in 2014, succeeding Steve Ballmer. Under Nadella's leadership, Microsoft's market value has increased significantly.
chunk_1cf3eb51aae1fdffa20ba484cc39a0d9: Steve Ballmer served as CEO of Microsoft from 2000 to 2014. He was the 30th employee hired by Bill Gates and Paul Allen.
chunk_f35c76e4203c23d26fe2fd45a808f72a: The Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation was established in 2000. It focuses on global health, poverty alleviation, and education initiatives worldwide.
chunk_ea9979594bca8d44b890b11622e212e1: Lionel Messi, also known as Leo Messi, is an Argentine professional footballer. He joined Inter Miami in 2023 after leaving Paris Saint-Germain.
chunk_83e2b3844a88848b0364e6aeab2bd861: Leo Messi won the FIFA World Cup with Argentina in 2022, defeating France in the final. He is considered one of the greatest football players of all time.
chunk_96f6eb6be250d49a226016f75449b3f0: Inter Miami is a Major League Soccer team based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. The team was founded by David Beckham in 2018.
chunk_ab3f37bfa656e8df065b191d5032dc15: Cristiano Ronaldo plays for Al-Nassr in Saudi Arabia. He previously played for Manchester United, Real Madrid, and Juventus.
chunk_b3cbab5db4aa7d9ba5a51a971196d9ad: Kylian Mbappé is a French professional footballer who currently plays for Real Madrid. He previously played for Paris Saint-Germain.
chunk_bdc54cbc95357c265133a196acba6af9: Paris Saint-Germain, commonly known as PSG, is a French football club based in Paris. The club is owned by Qatar Sports Investments.
chunk_9a9505afe0ff7f29affff36e490fa459: Elon Musk is the CEO of Tesla and SpaceX. He also acquired Twitter in 2022 and renamed it to X.
chunk_1d3c39a876b722c938f67f4978a22a5b: Tesla was founded in 2003 by Martin Eberhard and Marc Tarpenning. Elon Musk joined as chairman of the board and later became CEO.
chunk_8a366f0cb81ea8932e810fd2b1a4b5d7: SpaceX was founded by Elon Musk in 2002 with the goal of reducing space transportation costs and enabling the colonization of Mars.
chunk_2f3120fa8bbef7faaeaafde55ca5eee6: Jeff Bezos founded Amazon in 1994. He stepped down as CEO in 2021 but remains executive chairman of the company.
chunk_2c1abda200e87660e1ef1fc9187ba7b4: Amazon is headquartered in Seattle, Washington. The company started as an online bookstore before expanding into various product categories.
chunk_76c257f362a9ce354e7dfae19e7afba2: Blue Origin is a space company founded by Jeff Bezos in 2000. The company is developing vehicles for suborbital and orbital spaceflight.
